rationale: The citing paper’s core contribution is a scalable convex optimization for website-level bid/budget allocation using bid landscapes and cross-site audience overlap, whereas the cited paper is an experimental study of competitive advertising spillovers and frequency effects in a restaurant-search context. The provided evidence includes only a single DOI-level match (no local citation text), and the citing note’s stated prior-work links do not explicitly indicate use of spillover findings in the method, so the pair cannot be safely dropped or clearly kept from current evidence alone.
